video_info.title: South Africa Women's Tour of New Zealand 2026
video_info.shortDescription: New Zealand Women and South Africa Women return to Hagley Oval for the 1st ODI, opening a fresh chapter in their limited‑overs battle. With both sides eager to set the tone early in the series, New Zealand will look to transfer home advantage and recent momentum into the longer format, while South Africa aim to reset, regroup, and strike first in conditions that demand discipline and adaptability. Tune in to catch all the action from the 1st ODI of South Africa Women's Tour of New Zealand 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.

Tune in to catch all the action from the 1st ODI of South Africa Women's Tour of New Zealand 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UFC Fight Night - Adesanya vs Pyfer
video_info.shortDescription: UFC returns with a blockbuster Fight Night headliner as former middleweight champion Israel Adesanya steps back into the spotlight to face surging contender Joe Pyfer in a high‑stakes showdown. Adesanya enters looking to reassert his dominance at 185 pounds, while Pyfer arrives riding explosive momentum, eager to claim the biggest win of his career and punch his ticket into title‑contender status. Tune in to catch all the action from UFC Fight Night, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Sitaare Zameen Par
video_info.shortDescription: After a DUI, an arrogant basketball coach must train neurodivergent adults for community service, only to discover that his players will change his outlook on life. Catch Sitaare Zameen Par streaming from 3rd April, only on Sony LIV.
